briefings.title: Daily Financial Briefing
briefings.marketTone: Risk-off intensifies — Trump reinstates Hormuz blockade and floats a 20% cargo fee; oil jumps ~9–10%, US equities fall, yields rise into today's CPI and Warsh testimony.
